evals.prompt: We had an unplanned AG failover at 03:42 last night. I generated CLUSTER.LOG covering 03:30-04:00 using Get-ClusterLog. Why did it fail over?
evals.expected_output: Timeline reconstruction with lease timeout (L1) or health check failure (L2) detection. Root cause analysis (L3-L8 RHS crashes, L9-L12 network partition). References /errorlog-review and /hadr-health-review as companions.

evals.prompt: Cluster log shows quorum loss messages. Did we actually lose quorum?
evals.expected_output: L6 Quorum Loss confirmation with timeline, vote count, witness state. Cross-references node state changes leading up to quorum loss. Recommendations for quorum config review.
